title: jasione crispa subsp. crispa
intro: Jasione crispa subsp. crispa, also known as crinkle-leaved chamomile or crispa, is a type of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The plant's health benefits include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, as well as its ability to soothe digestive problems and calm the nervous system. Jasione crispa subsp. crispa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
